description: Single-port channel multiplexer — intent routing, bandwidth isolation, TBZ signing per frame

related.tibet-core: Provenance engine — TBZ frame signing uses TIBET tokens
related.ainternet: CLI & SDK — AINS resolve discovers mux endpoints
related.tibet-ainternet-mcp: MCP server — can route through mux channels

pypi.command: cd /srv/jtel-stack/packages/tibet-mux && rm -rf dist && python -m build && twine upload dist/*
